notes_for_human_reviewer: Floor submission. Names current phase ('execution') with surface reasoning, never works backward to the unresolved planning question. No transition awareness. No artifact-vs-understanding distinction. Methodology mention is empty ('flexibility'). Recommendation is 'have a meeting'. Tests whether the grader correctly bottoms out a clearly-shallow submission. Common drift: scoring 2-3 because the format LOOKS like a memo. The phase_diagnosis_accuracy cap rule (no backward trace caps at 3) is borderline — Claude might give 2 here; tolerance 1 allows 1-2.
